label: namecode - SHADOW.RAINBOW | 42 deg
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by Shadow and Rainbow. At sunset, an alignment of rainbow and mountain shadow was captured in this remarkable snapshot. The stunning view was recorded from a fire lookout on Smith Peak in the Plumas National Forest near Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
